'''safaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearmongerer|fearmongerer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearmongerer|fearmongerer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| safaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæfæjæth|sæfæjæth]] || [[word:sæfæjæj|sæfæjæj]] || [[word:sæfæjæsh|sæfæjæsh]] || [[word:sæfæjæ|sæfæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:safafajath|safafajath]] || [[word:safafajaj|safafajaj]] || [[word:safafajash|safafajash]] || [[word:safafaja|safafaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:safajath|safajath]] || [[word:safajaj|safajaj]] || [[word:safajash|safajash]] || [[word:safaja|safaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:safafjath|safafjath]] || [[word:safafjaj|safafjaj]] || [[word:safafjash|safafjash]] || [[word:safafjaf|safafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:safajatha|safajatha]] || [[word:safajaja|safajaja]] || [[word:safajasha|safajasha]] || [[word:safajaka|safajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:safajath|safajath]] || [[word:safajaj|safajaj]] || [[word:safajash|safajash]] || [[word:safaja|safaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:safajathal|safajathal]] || [[word:safajajal|safajajal]] || [[word:safajashal|safajashal]] || [[word:safajakal|safajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:safajathatha|safajathatha]] || [[word:safajajaja|safajajaja]] || [[word:safajashasha|safajashasha]] || [[word:safajaka|safajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:safajathan|safajathan]] || [[word:safajajan|safajajan]] || [[word:safajashan|safajashan]] || [[word:safajakan|safajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:safajathaoro|safajathaoro]] || [[word:safajajaoro|safajajaoro]] || [[word:safajashaoro|safajashaoro]] || [[word:safajakaoro|safajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
